action.reasoning: Observation: 89.51% test accuracy achieved but predict.py was truncated at SWA section, meaning SWA model wasn't used in the ensemble. Analysis: SWA often generalizes better on test data, and the ensemble weights (0.5/0.25/0.15/0.1) were set arbitrarily. Optimizing ensemble weights on validation data should yield a meaningful boost. Decision: (1) Write complete predict.py with working SWA ensemble, (2) Write a weight optimization script to find optimal ensemble weights on val set, (3) Update predict.py with optimal weights and submit eval.
